description_long: A wooden serving board holds a small assortment of sushi, including two maki rolls with visible seaweed exteriors and colorful fillings, and a piece of salmon nigiri with a slice of orange-pink salmon draped over a mound of white rice. A small, round dish of dark soy sauce sits nearby, its glossy surface reflecting light. A pair of light-colored wooden chopsticks rests diagonally across the board, adding to the traditional Japanese presentation. The maki rolls feature distinct fillings, one with a green center and the other with an orange center, likely cucumber and carrot or fish. The board itself has a smooth, natural wood grain finish, and the arrangement is neat and inviting. The overall scene evokes a fresh, appetizing sushi meal ready to be enjoyed.
description: A wooden board displays two maki rolls, a salmon nigiri, a soy sauce dish, and a pair of chopsticks, arranged in a traditional sushi presentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi assortment with the maki rolls, salmon nigiri, soy sauce dish, and chopsticks all clearly visible on the wooden board.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the salmon nigiri and soy sauce dish in the foreground, with the chopsticks resting on the board and maki rolls further back.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the maki rolls and chopsticks, with the salmon nigiri and soy sauce dish positioned further away.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the maki rolls and soy sauce dish, with the salmon nigiri and chopsticks visible along the sides.
